query: Set up a human-in-the-loop analysis pipeline for this project with quick exploratory runs first and more reproducible stages later.

Set up a forecasting pipeline with Prophet and compare it against a statsmodels ARIMA baseline.
Review my last experiment run and tell me if the metrics look reasonable before I approve.
Set up Hydra config composition with experiment configs and multirun sweeps for this analysis.

Run a Hydra multirun sweep over learning rates and batch sizes, then build a comparison table.
I want to evolve this exploratory notebook into a reproducible analysis workbench.
How should I structure the src/ package for this analysis project?

Help me scrape a website and save the results to CSV.
